'''gawoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:draftboard|draftboard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:draftboard|draftboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gawoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæweheth|gæweheth]] || [[word:gæwehej|gæwehej]] || [[word:gæwehesh|gæwehesh]] || [[word:gæwehe|gæwehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gawowohoth|gawowohoth]] || [[word:gawowohoj|gawowohoj]] || [[word:gawowohosh|gawowohosh]] || [[word:gawowoho|gawowoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gawohoth|gawohoth]] || [[word:gawohoj|gawohoj]] || [[word:gawohosh|gawohosh]] || [[word:gawoho|gawoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gawofhoth|gawofhoth]] || [[word:gawofhoj|gawofhoj]] || [[word:gawofhosh|gawofhosh]] || [[word:gawofhof|gawofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gawohotho|gawohotho]] || [[word:gawohojo|gawohojo]] || [[word:gawohosho|gawohosho]] || [[word:gawohoko|gawohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gawohoth|gawohoth]] || [[word:gawohoj|gawohoj]] || [[word:gawohosh|gawohosh]] || [[word:gawoho|gawoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gawohothol|gawohothol]] || [[word:gawohojol|gawohojol]] || [[word:gawohoshol|gawohoshol]] || [[word:gawohokol|gawohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gawohothotho|gawohothotho]] || [[word:gawohojojo|gawohojojo]] || [[word:gawohoshosho|gawohoshosho]] || [[word:gawohoko|gawohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gawohothon|gawohothon]] || [[word:gawohojon|gawohojon]] || [[word:gawohoshon|gawohoshon]] || [[word:gawohokon|gawohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gawohothoro|gawohothoro]] || [[word:gawohojoro|gawohojoro]] || [[word:gawohoshoro|gawohoshoro]] || [[word:gawohokoro|gawohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
